About Me

I am an Accounting and Finance student at Dublin City University with a strong interest in financial analysis, corporate governance, and sustainable business practices.

My academic background has equipped me with solid foundations in financial reporting, data analysis, and strategic decision-making. I have developed practical experience through coursework involving financial modelling, ESG evaluation, and business case analysis.

I am particularly interested in how financial insights can support long-term value creation and responsible corporate strategy. I enjoy working with data, interpreting financial trends, and presenting insights in a clear and structured way.

I am currently seeking opportunities to further develop my skills in finance, consulting, or data-driven business roles.

Featured Projects

Project 1: Financial Performance & Valuation Analysis

A comprehensive diagnostic of corporate financial health using Python. This project covers profitability ratios, liquidity assessment, and DCF valuation models to translate complex datasets into strategic investment recommendations and trend forecasts.

View Report

Project 2: Nestlé ESG Governance & Climate Accountability

An advanced data visualization project evaluating Nestlé’s structural governance and environmental delivery. By integrating Python-driven radar and bullet charts, it analyzes the alignment between executive remuneration and 2025 plastic reduction targets.

View Report

Project 3: Datalex plc Corporate Governance Diagnostic

A strategic case study on governance risks within the aviation tech sector. It identifies critical independence deficits and ownership concentration issues, benchmarking Datalex against QCA standards to assess long-term reputational and operational risks.

View PDF

Dublin City University

BSc Accounting & Finance
